prompt: What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?

inputData.question: What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"What is the average overall evaluation rating per department?"},"startedAt":1771855668952,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants the average overall evaluation rating per department. I need to join course_evaluations → enrollments → course_sections → courses → departments, then group by department and calculate the average of overall_rating. The schema confirms: course_evaluations has overall_rating and enrollment_id; enrollments has course_section_id; course_sections has course_id; courses has department_id; departments has name and code for identification.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name
","assumptions":["overall_rating is the evaluation metric requested","only evaluations with valid enrollments and course sections are included","results are ordered alphabetically by department name for consistency"]},"endedAt":1771855707801},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id

ORDER BY d.name

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating per Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating per Department

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.overall_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_overall_rating
FROM course_evaluations ce
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON ce.enrollment_id = e.id
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
INNER JOIN courses c ON cs.course_id = c.id
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code
ORDER BY d.name

sample.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach
